Learning Python From a JavaScript Background (2): The Origin Story
Learning Python From a JavaScript Background

Every programming language has its own little birth story. JavaScript's is famously chaotic (the whole "Java vs JavaScript is like dog vs hot dog" thing), so what about Python? Is its history just as fun? This post takes a quick look at where Python came from, why it's named after a comedy troupe, and what makes its syntax so clean.
